title: Better Ladders [Continued]
description: 4 new ladder types, each being a better and more exclusive craftable variant, all in 3D.
body:
Note this is a continuation of this seemlying abandoned [project](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-ladders). 

This mod adds:

3D ladders models (like this one on mod icon)
4 New ladder types
Changeable (in config) ladder speed
New ladder types:

Iron - 1.5 times faster than wooden
Gold - 2 times faster than wooden
Diamond - 2.5 times faster than wooden
Netherite - 3 times faster than wooden
 

To make a higher tier ladder you need the previous one
